structural_claim: Nonlinearity enables stable localized excitations that behave as effective particles

supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Strongly correlated electrons form incompressible quantum fluids at fractional filling factors, revealing that electron-electron interactions can create emergent quasiparticles with fractional charge
Nonlinearity can exactly balance dispersion to create shape-preserving light pulses, revealing that nonlinear optical media support stable localized excitations analogous to particle-like states
